# Getting Started

Welcome to the documentation for **Bayesian Neural Networks through Stein VI in JAX**. This guide will help you understand the structure and the main components of this project.

## Quick Overview
This repository is focused on applying Bayesian inference with Stein Variational Gradient Descent (SVGD) to train neural networks efficiently.

To explore the source files and understand the code in detail, check the following modules listed below.
